title: Tsiphyown #6837
definition:
Ziphion = "lookout"

 1) a son of Gad and progenitor of the family of Zephonites
    1a) also 'Zephon'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ziphion = "lookout"

 1) a son of Gad and progenitor of the family of Zephonites
    1a) also 'Zephon'

    NASB:  perh. gazing, a son of Gad, the same as 6827
